scenarios.title: AutoML Experiment Management
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when tasks mention NNI, Neural Network Intelligence, nnictl, AutoML experiments, HPO, NAS, compression, feature selectors, or NNI optional dependency failures.
scenarios.role: Routes NNI AutoML tasks to focused HPO, NAS, compression, and utility guidance with bundled validators and diagnostics.
scenarios.read_when: nni, nnictl, ExperimentConfig, search_space, tuner, assessor, ModelSpace, LayerChoice, config_list, pruner, quantizer, GBDTSelector, concrete_trace, torch or pytorch_lightning import failures in NNI workflows
scenarios.best_for: Creating and debugging NNI experiments, search spaces, NAS model spaces, compression configs, feature selectors, optional dependency triage, and repo-specific API routing.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is general model training unrelated to NNI, frontend-only TypeScript development, or cloud resource provisioning without an NNI experiment/config context.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `nni` for NNI-specific AutoML APIs and configs; route within it by practical workflow instead of source folder names. Prefer HPO for nnictl/Experiment/search-space tasks, NAS for model-space/evaluator/strategy tasks, compression for config_list/pruner/quantizer tasks, and utilities for feature selectors or tracing helpers.
